title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Determine whether kernel-task-completion-backup / GHA recording is usable from Claude/FUGUE flows, not just Codex. Focus on workflow, local runner scripts, and any docs or workflows that invoke task completion backup from Claude/FUGUE...
summary_text: **Recommendation** Do **not** call `scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh` from `fugue-codex-implement` as the first wiring step. `kernel-run-complete.sh` enforces local verify gate preconditions (`kernel-phase-gate check verify`) that GitHub workflow jobs do not guarantee: - [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:88) - [kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh:272) - [kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh:294) This would make successful implement runs fragile and can violate current workflow-side “bounded propagation/no-op” contract: - [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:238) - [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:267) **Minimal robust wiring** Add a new workflow step in `fugue-codex-implement` (after successful Codex execution, gated by `inputs.kernel_run_id != ''`) that calls the backup runner directly: - Script: `scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` - Gate: same as current compact propagation gate (`steps.codex.outputs.exit_code == '0' && inputs.kernel_run_id != ''`) - Pass explicit args/env for attribution: - `--assistant codex` (executor attribution in this workflow) - `--source fugue-run-complete` (FUGUE path attribution) - `--session-id "${{ inputs.kernel_run_id }}"` - `--summary "<bounded workflow completion summary>"` - `--cwd "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"` - `--title "fugue-codex-implement:${{ needs.prepare.outputs.issue_number }}"` - `GH_TOKEN=${{ github.token }}` - `GHA_REPO=${{ github.repository }}` Keep existing compact `manual_snapshot` step unchanged: - [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml:651) **Tests to update** - Extend [test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh) to assert: - completion-backup step exists - gate condition is success + `kernel_run_id` present - `--assistant codex` + `--source fugue-run-complete` + `--session-id ${{ inputs.kernel_run_id }}` are wired - Existing wrapper override tests already cover assistant/source plumb-through: - [test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:93) - [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:49) **Docs to update** - [gha24-mainframe-flow.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/gha24-mainframe-flow.md:11): mention completion backup dispatch on successful implement when `kernel_run_id` is present. - Optionally clarify in [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:238) that this is audit/mirror dispatch only, not `phase_completed`/`run_completed` truth establishment. **Risks** - Calling `kernel-run-complete.sh` directly in CI risks false failures due to missing local runtime evidence. - Duplicate completion records can occur if local operator also runs `run-complete` for same `kernel_run_id`. - If source taxonomy matters, `fugue-run-complete` should be kept consistent across tooling; otherwise reports fragment.
